title: Career Paths in Core Mechanical Engineering
desc: A panel of industry experts walks through real career trajectories in mechanical engineering — from design to manufacturing to project leadership.
speaker: Panel: Industry Experts

title: Electric Vehicles and Powertrain dimensioning
desc: Explore how embedded systems power the next generation of electric vehicles in India. From battery management to motor control.
speaker: Gunank Hora
speakerRole: System Engineer – Electric Drive, Axiolift Electric Trucks, Stuttgart, Germany

title: From Conventional Building to Green Buildings: What Engineer Must Change
desc: This session highlighted the shift from traditional construction practices to sustainable, energy-efficient green building design.
speaker: Abdul Moeed Chaudhary
speakerRole: Managing Director at Essential India Greenedge Analytics Pvt. Ltd.

title: Hydro Power Plant & Turbine Diameter Calculation
desc: This session shows how water head, discharge, and speed are used to calculate turbine runner diameter.
speaker: Pradeep Hegde

title: Edge Detection in Images Processing for Civil Engineering Applications
desc: This session explored how edge detection techniques in image processing help identify boundaries, cracks, and structural defects.
speaker: Dr. Narayan Rao Bhogapurapu
